name: Stir-Fried Beef Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Partially freeze beef; slice thinly across the grain into bite-size strips.
2. In a wok or large skillet, cook half the beef in hot oil until browned on all sides. Remove from pan and set aside.
3. Repeat with remaining beef and garlic, removing from pan.
4. Add mushrooms, cucumber, green pepper strips, onion rings, Italian seasoning, salt, and pepper to the wok.
5. Stir-fry 3 minutes or until vegetables are crisp-tender. Return beef to wok; add tomato. Cook 1 to 2 minutes or until heated through.
6. Remove meat-vegetable mixture to serving bowl and keep warm.
7. Add spinach leaves to wok; cover and cook for 1 minute or until slightly wilted.
8. To serve, arrange spinach on four bowls or plates; spoon meat mixture atop.
